system.description:
"NO MORE TRICKS. HONEST."

Worthy Underdog. You give up Sneak Attack and Vicious Opportunist, in exchange gain:

  • (1/turn) When you HIT an enemy in melee that has The Upper Hand you may change the Primary Die roll to whatver you like and deal an additional +1d6 damage (this increases as your Sneak Attack dice would).
  • Enemies that have The Upper Hand, miss you on 2 or less.

The Upper Hand. Enemies have The Upper Hand whenever there is more than 1 of them adjacent to a friendly creature, or whenever they could attack you with advantage.

LEVEL 3

Prove Your Worth! (Reach 12, 1/turn) Taunt an enemy for free (lasts until they damage you). Enemies you Taunt have advantage on attacks against you.

LEVEL 7

Old Habits… Choose 1 Underhanded Ability.

LEVEL 11

Right Where I Want You. You have advantage against enemies with The Upper Hand.

LEVEL 15

Guard Breaker. (1/Safe Rest) When Defending against melee attack, double your armor. The attacker becomes Incapacitated until the end of their next turn.

Honorable Gambits. For every Underhanded Ability you would have (except for your Old Habits…), choose an Honorable Gambit instead: Conqueror's Confidence, Deft Parry, Down not out!, Frightful Confidence, Mark of Deflection, Nowhere to Flee!, Redemption Arc, Riposte, Say that to my face!
